return H(K)end,function(C,G)local H=u(G)local l=function(...)return N(C,{...},G,H)end return l end,{},function()T=(294227-294226)+T V[T]=-310031-(-310032)return T end,{}return(q(3923744-(-978083),{}))(H(K))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[G(-586394-(-551861))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
